title: Journaled Promotion, Approval Context, and Receipts
description: Make canonical promotion recoverable, atomic or journaled, idempotent, and fully receipted while enforcing context-bound approvals and TEST/PRODUCTION side-effect isolation.
acceptance_criteria: Promotion is recoverable after interruption and partial authority cannot persist
Immutable receipts bind exact input hashes, output hashes, transaction identity, and execution context
Approval evaluation binds decision, execution context, permitted action, subject, content hash, authority, validity, and consumption state
TEST approvals cannot authorize PRODUCTION effects, production receipts, REAL feedback, or production model ingestion
TEST execution uses adapters that are technically incapable of external side effects
Import, replay, migration, rollback, and recovery cannot escalate or rewrite approval context
